Love/Uplifting.verse_1:
Every morning starts with your light
The world feels right when you are near
I chase the warmth of golden skies
And find my home in your eyes
Love/Uplifting.chorus:
We rise we fall we start again
Together we are more than just friends
I'd cross the stars to find your hand
Forever yours is where I stand
Love/Uplifting.verse_2:
The nights grow short when you are close
I hold the moments that matter most
Your voice the anchor in the storm
In your arms I am always home
Love/Uplifting.bridge:
Nothing can shake us now
We've been through everything somehow
Stronger in every way
I'd choose you any day

Dark/Hypnotic.verse_1:
Beneath the surface something stirs
A frequency the body learns
The beat descends the walls dissolve
A puzzle no one needs to solve
Dark/Hypnotic.chorus:
Sink into the rhythm now
Let the current show you how
Lose the noise and find the core
This is what the dark is for
Dark/Hypnotic.verse_2:
The signal hums through concrete veins
A city breathing through the pain
We are the pulse we are the code
A thousand lights along the road
Dark/Hypnotic.bridge:
Can you feel it underground
The silent hum without a sound
We are the signal we are the wave
Beyond the borders of the sane
